name: Hermits
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop raisins finely in a food processor with 1/4 cup flour.
2. Sift together 2 cups flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and spices.
3. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add dry ingredients to the butter mixture alternately with milk, mixing until well combined.
5. Stir in the raisins and enough additional flour (up to 3/4 cup) to form a stiff dough.
6. Shape the dough into two logs, each about 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
7. Chill the logs overnight or freeze until ready to use.
When ready to serve:
8. Slice the logs to your desired thickness.
9. Bake at 375-400 degrees Fahrenheit (190-200 degrees Celsius) for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
